prompt:
Subject: Ethereal underwater portrait.

Subject/Expression: Young woman with black hair, transparent skin, delicate Japanese-style hair and makeup, natural makeup with soft healthy color, quiet and fleeting expression, slightly downcast eyes, atmosphere like being in a dream.

Clothing/Pose: Sheer material dress with a luster of pale blue, pink, and orange, design where sheer ribbon-like fabric wraps the whole body, pose drifting while gently twisting the body underwater, one hand reaching down, the other arm placed naturally, hair and fabric spreading wide along the water current.

Background/Light: Inside the clear blue sea of Okinawa, vibrant coral reefs spreading on the seabed, mystical space with small tropical fish swimming around, soft light rays piercing from the water surface, sparkling bubbles, highly transparent seawater, bright and mysterious underwater world.

Composition/Camera: Vertical full-body oriented portrait, slightly slanted angle, flowing composition centered on the person, wide 35mm lens expression, shallow depth of field, cinematic underwater shot emphasizing depth through the flow of hair, fabric, and bubbles.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, realistic skin texture where pores and grain look natural, details of hair sparkling under the light, bubbles as transparent as glass reflecting iridescently, lighting with strong fantasy feel, transparent photographic expression, dreamy and glamorous underwater fantasy, magazine photo level perfection.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange eye contact, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, broken clothes, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, AI-specific unnatural texture, muddy seawater, unnatural bubbles, unnatural fish, messy background, text, logo, watermark.
